title: Smoky Flaky Jamaican Cheddar Dumplings
description: A kid-friendly Jamaican-inspired dish that delivers smoky flavor and flaky texture, featuring mature cheddar (or vegan cheddar) in each bite-perfect for a quick lunch.

ingredients.name: cheddar cheese, shredded
ingredients.notes: Use mature cheddar or a vegan cheddar substitute

instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C) and lightly grease a baking sheet.
In a bowl, whisk together flour, baking powder, salt, and smoked paprika until well combined.
Add shredded cheddar and butter to the dry mixture, mixing until the dough starts to form clumps.
Stir in almond milk a tablespoon at a time until a soft, pliable dough forms. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto the prepared sheet, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
Bake for 12–15 minutes, or until the dumplings puff up slightly and the tops are golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool on the sheet for 3 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to finish crisping.
Serve warm with a side of coconut curry or a simple tropical fruit salad for a complete meal.
Enjoy the smoky, flaky bite that kids will love, and the comforting aroma of Jamaican spices.
